## Summary

CAT stock is trading **47.62% above** its 150-day simple moving average, indicating extremely strong bullish momentum. This represents a **NEW ALL-TIME HIGH** divergence from the 150-day SMA, surpassing the previous peak of +46.82% set in October 2025.
